userProfile.title: User Profile
userProfile.description: Stores user preferences and general commitment count

uid.description: The unique user ID matching request.auth.uid

muted.description: Whether UI sound effects are muted

darkMode.description: Whether Dark Mode theme is enabled

pinkMode.description: Whether sub-theme Pink Mode is enabled

updatedAt.description: The server timestamp when the user document was updated

prayerDay.title: Prayer Day Record
prayerDay.description: Stores prayer checklist details for a given date YYYY-MM-DD

updatedAt.description: The server timestamp when the day record was updated

/users/{userId}.description: User profile with commitment counter and user preferences

/users/{userId}/days/{dateId}.description: Subcollection of date-specific completed prayers for tracking history
